narrative.description: Among Us is a multiplayer social deduction game where crewmates complete tasks while impostors sabotage and eliminate players without being caught.
narrative.core_loop: Complete ship tasks as crewmates or secretly eliminate crew and sabotage systems as impostors, then debate and vote in emergency meetings to eject suspects.

mechanics.map_notes: In Among Us, players have different roles, abilities, or win conditions in the same match.
mechanics.expression: In Among Us, players have different roles, abilities, or win conditions in the same match.

mechanics.map_notes: In Among Us, players collect clues and deduce correct answers from constrained evidence sets.
mechanics.expression: In Among Us, players collect clues and deduce correct answers from constrained evidence sets.

mechanics.map_notes: In Among Us, same-screen or local wireless play pits players against each other in shared sessions.
mechanics.expression: In Among Us, same-screen or local wireless play pits players against each other in shared sessions.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Among Us through its core party loop.
